column1: Hey Brian, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hey Spiffy, our spring break is March 9-13
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Oh bet thats where I'll be too. would be dope to have you there
how many ppl in your group so far?
So far I have 4 that are in, 1 that is waiting for pricing and waiting for a text back on another
We are not set and stone but this is one of our top options depending on price
okay bet bet yea its super affordable, will send it over in a sec
Word, we from the University of Tennessee
Fire yea we got a few groups from your school this year. y'all def know how to party lol
yessir. gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Depends on the other guys I'm going with but a lot of us would like to get this done sooner than later
Yea I feel that. things def move quick this time of year with everyone booking
I'll send what we have rn and then add in a payment plan to split things into two for y'all. make things easier
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if it came through
Yea I got it, and this number is per person right?
yessir thats per person for the entire duration of the trip. everything included but flights
cheaper to get those separately on your own. best way to save bread
Understood, lemme call the boys and will get back to you
yessir. which airport you wanna fly out of? ill send you a good flight y'all can grab

I appreciate the offer but we already went through flights and things like that. Only question I had was what time would we be able to check into the hotel and how long of a drive is it from the airport?

check in is typically 3p but if rooms are available at the time you get there you'll be able to check in. if theyre not youre still able to put your bags to the side and use the resort. drink, pool, eat, etc
Our package comes with transportation from the airport when you land. you just enter your flight info on your account and our team organizes everything for you
Ok awesome thank you, is it cool if I follow up with you either late today or tomorrow once I get confirmation from the other guys?
Another quick question, when would the money be due by?

yea so first is a deposit of only $200 that locks in each persons spot, pricing, etc. then the remaining balance is in 2 weeks, so Jan 5th. gives you a little time to get the rest of the funds situated
Briana whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
Good a lot the boys are in, just still waiting for a 100% from 3
okay cool. lookin like more than the original 4?

Yea so we got 7. So we would have to do a 4 person room and a 3 person room. Would there be any way for us to get the same rate on the 3 person room as the 4 person room so 3 people aren't having to pay more?
possibly, I'd have to pull some strings for it
we'd just have to move on things pretty quickly
Yea we can do that, what do you need from us
once I get the green light I'm able to set up the reservation. once I set that the next step is for each of you to hop on and reserve your slots
the deposit is $200 to secure the spot
assuming youre still waiting for the 3, but we could also get the definite 4 rolling since y'all 100% going
We got the 7 ready to go
Would you send a link or something?
Okay bet gimme 5 min to get the green light on the rate and yea I'll send the link over through text and email
Sounds good and then each person will be able to handle their own end?
yup everyone handles their own account and their own deposit. that way you dont gotta chase everyone around for Venmos lol
hey we wanted to do 5 nights right? or 4
which price were you looking at
bet. got the green light on the 3 person room price being 646 as well
making this all now and sending over
Also for the 3 people room is it the same layout as the 4 person room or do you guys bring in like a roll in bed or pull out couch?
the rooms all have 2 double beds and 2 couches. pretty spacious
just emailed your reservation over too btw, added the booze cruise event in there for y'all since you're depositing today
Thank you very much but I saw it says 5 night stay with the 4 night stay dates. Did you mean say 4 night stay?
Yea my b bro thats a typo on me
7th to 11th is 4 nights. was typing fast
got excited to get it to you after getting the green light lol
I appreciate you throwing in the booze cruise
Brian brotha whats good, hows things lookin on your end?
Good man, everyone put down their 200 the day you sent it to us
Still looking at flights but will have those booked soon and will be paying the rest by the deadline
okay bet bet, yea I peeped that. just wanted to check in and see if you needed anything
Soon as you get the flight info you can enter it right into the account
Sounds good, I appreciate you reaching out
yooo bro when you can, can you enter your flight info onto your accounts so we can sched airport transportation
Yea ofc, sorry for the delay, with get it done tmr for sure
yoyo still waiting on flight info from a few of you if you can get it in
Bet thanks. Owen and Jake rn. they on the same flight as you?
Owen is, Jake has a different arrival flight I will text him to add it to the site
bet I just added owens in
yoyo! just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets for the nightclub events?
I think we are gonna do the Coco Bongo, just need to get the guys on it
aight bet. yea I know Madeline's group is doing Coco too
I can add it into each of your accounts but just lmk once you know if the guys are on board
Ok word, will text you about it by the end of today
bet. lookin forward to havin y'all out there with us bro, gonna be lit. I'll be there when you get there
yooo safe travels today my dog. see y'all out here
Hey spiffy I was just wondering if we need id to get into coco bongo tn or is the ticket enough?
Yo! No ID needed to get in
Word, what time does the bus leave
yoo hope you had a good trip my dog!
